REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS KORI GRISWOLD, GRACE KING, AND MARISSA ROCCHI'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT CROSS-COMPLAINANT LENDERS COMMERCIAL FINANCE LLCS CROSS-COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO C.C.P 425.16 IS DENIED. CROSS-COMPLAINT, AS ALLEGED, DOES NOT ARISE OUT OF PLAINTIFF'S PROTECTED ACTIVITIES. ACTUAL CONTROVERSY EXISTS BETWEEN THE PARTIES AND DOES NOT ARISE OUT FILING OF THIS ACTION. (CROSS-COMPLAINT 8: 1-12). ALL ELEMENTS OF FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION PRE-DATE THE FILING OF THIS ACTION AND DAMAGES SOUGHT THERE IN HAVE NO CONNECTION TO THIS ACTION. (CROSS-COMPLAINT 9:11-13). THE COURT FINDS THAT THE MOTION IS FRIVOLOUS AND FILED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DELAY. CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)
